{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172534EC9EE1ACBBEF07AA92C2"}"},"total":1070},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7488654731324457790","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"现在是242章，作者终于开始连载了，前面作者说过因为有事断更了好几个月。然后现在就顺便给个评价吧，大逃生求生类，智斗水准在我看来属于中上，有一定深度而且易懂。关于系统的方面，因为有了神道圣地，系统方面给的更像是把主角身体脑子基础打好相当于提的下限，神道圣地提的是上限，所以系统的挂小高，但是不会太影响。世界观大小的话目前还不好判断，目前接触的信息有限，不确定究竟是一个小白鼠的竞争实验，还是一个单组织培养有潜力手下的手段。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743593990,"group_id":"7386861534246341694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"命若繁星，望而不及","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0QfLFwINwl2hbhrnbuVd+k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/860285bf394e4c5ea6445c6173f26f48~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530122&x-signature=4Nrg2BAnG3jkVmqMvUZ8g7nK%2Bqs%3D","user_id":"101678612378","user_name":"不知名无名客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101678612378","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1754993132,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}" 最终，只能有一个人能活着出去
他将获得一千万现金

5057086","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一部分节奏很快，很好。第二部分可能作者写了一段时间拉长了，总体而言不错，游戏虽然老套但是可看，目前槽点还算好，总之值得看吧，希望后期不要烂尾，继续保持，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728985428,"group_id":"7386861534246341694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwzWfVckDl0g/lUkoldgs1Fgl+JkdyodzRp2/nB7WW9Q","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4295173017451299","user_name":"赫城的金小天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4295173017451299","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386861534246341694","book_info":{"abstract":"【大逃杀】【鱿鱼游戏升级版】【人性与黑暗】【心理博弈】
